headline: Chest-high SSE on a prime angle, clean morning — the pick of the three today.
today: Solid 2-3ft at prime angle with light dawn wind and cross-off through the morning, so this is your best bet in the area. Ride the morning before the E cross and evening ESE cross-on soften it up. Shortboard or fish will have fun; not a log day.

daysToWatch.note: 18mph NNE at dawn easing through the morning — cross-off so surfable but breezy, and only knee-to-waist high. Marginal.
Big swell on paper: up to 5-6ft-plus at prime angle, but onshore/cross-on wind all day makes it a messy, sizey mixed bag. Check it if the wind backs off but temper expectations.
3ft-plus prime angle with wind going light to NNE cross-off by afternoon — the clean window to target. Afternoon shortboard session.
